tester.role: automated fontTools inspection with human result review

steps: Download the exact TTF from the pinned Google Fonts source commit.
Inspect name, version, OS/2 fsType, fvar axes, cmap, GSUB/GPOS feature tags, and required currency/punctuation code points.
Compare advance widths of base digits zero through nine.
expected: File parses cleanly; identity and version are readable; embedding flag, axes, binary coverage, OpenType features, currency glyphs, and numeral widths can be recorded.
actual: Parsed as IBM Plex Sans version 3.201. SHA-256 matched candidate record. fsType was 0. Weight axis was 100–700 and width axis 75–100. Basic Latin, extended Latin, Greek, and Cyrillic code points were present in this file. INR, USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, bullet, en dash, and em dash were present. Base digits had equal advance widths; a slashed-zero feature was present.

artifacts.description: Candidate metadata derived from this inspection

notes: Pass covers this Google Fonts Latin/Greek/Cyrillic file only. IBM's separately published script families are different files and require their own tests. Width-axis behaviour, application behaviour, static file choice, and human typography review remain unverified.
